# IntelliForge Bootcamp Assistant — Integration Spec

> Machine-readable integration guide for embedding the bootcamp FAQ chat widget on upskill.intelliforge.tech or any `*.intelliforge.tech` site.

## Purpose

Add a floating chat assistant to a marketing site. The assistant answers questions about the IntelliForge AI Bootcamp (pricing, curriculum, build-alongside, credential, time commitment) using RAG over `intelliforge-faq.md`.

**Integration model:** Host site loads a third-party script. The script renders a launcher button and iframe panel. The iframe calls a remote API. The host site does **not** implement chat UI, RAG, or LLM calls.

**Primary consumer:** https://upskill.intelliforge.tech/

---

## Architecture

```
Host site (e.g. upskill.intelliforge.tech)
  └── <script src=".../embed.js">          ← you add this only
        └── launcher button (fixed, bottom corner)
        └── iframe → widget-host/embed     ← chat panel UI
              └── fetch → fly.dev/ask      ← agent API (automatic)
```

| Layer | URL | Role |
|-------|-----|------|
| Widget loader | https://masterclass-first-agent.vercel.app/embed.js | Injects UI into host page |
| Embed panel | https://masterclass-first-agent.vercel.app/embed | Compact chat inside iframe |
| Agent API | https://masterclass-first-agent.fly.dev | FastAPI `POST /ask` |
| Knowledge | ChromaDB in Fly image | Ingested from `data/intelliforge-faq.md` at deploy |

---

## Step 1 — Add the script tag (preferred)

Place once in the global layout or HTML shell (every page):

```html
<script
  src="https://masterclass-first-agent.vercel.app/embed.js"
  data-position="bottom-right"
  defer
></script>
```

### Script behavior

1. Creates `#if-chat-launcher` — green circular button, fixed bottom-right (z-index ~2147483646).
2. Creates `#if-chat-panel` — hidden container with iframe (z-index ~2147483645).
3. Click launcher → panel opens, iframe loads `https://masterclass-first-agent.vercel.app/embed`.
4. User closes panel → iframe posts `postMessage("intelliforge-chat-close", "*")` → panel hides.
5. Mobile: panel expands to ~85vh from bottom; launcher stays visible.

### Script attributes

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| `data-position` | `bottom-right`, `bottom-left` | `bottom-right` |
| `data-base` | Full widget origin, e.g. `https://masterclass-first-agent.vercel.app` | Derived from script `src` |

Example — left side:

```html
<script
  src="https://masterclass-first-agent.vercel.app/embed.js"
  data-position="bottom-left"
  defer
></script>
```

---

## Step 2 — Alternative: direct iframe

Use only if CSP blocks third-party scripts. You lose the launcher; the iframe is always visible.

```html
<iframe
  src="https://masterclass-first-agent.vercel.app/embed"
  title="IntelliForge Bootcamp Assistant"
  style="position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;width:min(400px,calc(100vw - 32px));height:min(620px,calc(100dvh - 120px));border:none;border-radius:14px;z-index:9999;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.45)"
  allow="clipboard-write"
></iframe>
```

Prefer the script tag — it includes open/close behavior.

---

## Step 3 — Host-site requirements

### Content Security Policy

Ensure the host CSP allows:

- `script-src`: `https://masterclass-first-agent.vercel.app` (for embed.js)
- `frame-src` or `child-src`: `https://masterclass-first-agent.vercel.app` (for /embed iframe)

The widget host already allows framing **from** upskill via `frame-ancestors` on `/embed`:

```
frame-ancestors 'self' https://upskill.intelliforge.tech https://*.intelliforge.tech
```

### Z-index

Do not place other fixed bottom-right CTAs in the same corner. The launcher uses z-index ~2147483645.

### Next.js host example

In `app/layout.tsx`:

```tsx
export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <html lang="en">
      <body>
        {children}
        <script
          src="https://masterclass-first-agent.vercel.app/embed.js"
          data-position="bottom-right"
          defer
        />
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}
```

Or use `next/script` with `strategy="lazyOnload"`.

---

## API reference (informational — widget calls this, not the host)

### Health check

```
GET https://masterclass-first-agent.fly.dev/
→ 200 {"status":"ok","service":"my-first-agent"}
```

### Ask

```
POST https://masterclass-first-agent.fly.dev/ask
Content-Type: application/json

{"question": "What does the 12-week bootcamp cost?", "max_iterations": 4}

→ 200 {"question":"...","answer":"..."}
```

- `max_iterations` optional, default 4.
- Single-turn Q&A per submit (no server-side chat history).
- First request after idle may take ~30s (Fly.io cold start in Mumbai). Widget shows a warming indicator.

### CORS

Allowed origins include:

- `https://upskill.intelliforge.tech`
- `https://*.intelliforge.tech` (regex)
- `https://masterclass-first-agent.vercel.app`
- `http://localhost:3000` (dev)

Extra origins: set `CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS` env on Fly (comma-separated).

---

## Verification checklist

After integrating on the host site:

1. [ ] Green launcher visible bottom-right (or bottom-left if configured).
2. [ ] Click opens chat panel with "Bootcamp Assistant" header.
3. [ ] Sample question "What does the 12-week bootcamp cost?" returns an answer.
4. [ ] Close (X) button collapses the panel.
5. [ ] No CSP console errors for script or frame.
6. [ ] Mobile: panel usable without obscuring critical nav.

---

## In scope vs out of scope

### In scope (host-site integration)

- Add `embed.js` script tag to global layout.
- Fix CSP / z-index conflicts on the host site.
- Verify widget on preview and production.

### Out of scope (do not do on host site)

- Rebuild chat UI components.
- Call `/ask` directly from host-site code (widget handles this).
- Modify masterclass-first-agent repo during upskill integration.
- Re-implement RAG, Chroma, or LLM provider routing.

### Out of scope (widget/backend repo — separate task)

- Update FAQ content → edit `data/intelliforge-faq.md`, run ingest, redeploy Fly.
- Eliminate cold start → set `min_machines_running = 1` in `fly.toml`.
- Multi-turn chat history, streaming responses, rate limiting.

---

## Redeploy (widget/backend maintainers only)

```bash
# After FAQ changes
uv run python -m scripts.ingest

# Backend (bundles .chroma into Docker image)
fly deploy

# Frontend (embed.js + /embed route)
cd web && vercel --prod
```

---

## Source files (masterclass-first-agent repo)

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `web/public/embed.js` | Script-tag loader |
| `web/src/app/embed/page.tsx` | Embed route |
| `web/src/components/EmbedPanel.tsx` | Panel shell + close postMessage |
| `web/src/components/ChatInterface.tsx` | Chat UI (`variant="embed"`) |
| `web/next.config.ts` | `frame-ancestors` CSP |
| `src/server.py` | FastAPI + CORS |
| `data/intelliforge-faq.md` | RAG knowledge base |
| `docs/EMBED.md` | Human-readable duplicate of this spec |
